title: Zealand's stock falls 35% after disappointing drug result. Its CEO tells CNBC people need to focus less on the 'weight loss Olympics'
summary_full: Zealand and Roche are jointly developing the drug petrelintide which in a mid-stage study led to a worse-than-expected 10.7% weight-loss over 42 weeks.
summary_public: Zealand and Roche are jointly developing the drug petrelintide which in a mid-stage study led to a worse-than-expected 10.7% weight-loss over 42 weeks.
